matches.x: up, and encamped against Jabesh-gilead; and all the men of Jabesh said unto Nahash, Make a covenant-with us, and we will serve thee. 2.And Nahash the Ammonite answered them, On this condition will I make a covenant with you, that I may thrust out all your right eyes, and lay it fora reproach in all Israel.
